scripts.dev: bun run build:modules && concurrently -n web,admin,api,internal -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow "bun run dev:web" "bun run dev:admin" "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:internal-api"
scripts.dev:api: bun run build:modules && bun run --filter @repo/api start:dev
scripts.dev:internal-api: bun run build:modules && bun run --filter @repo/internal-api start:dev
scripts.build: bun run build:modules && bun run build:apps
scripts.build:modules: bun run --filter @repo/order build && bun run --filter @repo/product build
scripts.build:apps: bun run --filter @repo/admin build && bun run --filter @repo/agent build && bun run --filter @repo/api build && bun run --filter @repo/cli build && bun run --filter @repo/internal-api build && bun run --filter @repo/web build
scripts.verify: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run test:architecture && bun run build
scripts.verify:affected: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
